notes: Cross-section parity sweep against content-data.js plus legacy parity docs and live HTTP spot-checks (173 unique URLs checked).

issues.summary: Press entry links to the wrong legacy slug (Malaysia bridge article) for a Business Insider title.
issues.details: Title 'Meet the group trying to take down North Korea with USB sticks' currently points to /malaysias-bridge-is-falling-down-2/, which is a different article and indicates a broken mapping.

issues.summary: Press Bitcoin Magazine slug returns 404 (likely stale slug variant).
issues.details: https://bitcoinmagazine.com/culture/in-china-its-blockchain-and-tyranny-vs-bitcoin-and-freedom returned 404, while essays section uses the working op-ed slug variant.

issues.summary: Interviews top-fold cards reuse press featured imagery, creating cross-page hero duplication.
issues.details: Interviews item #0 and #1 use press featured image assets (cnn/time), causing repeated top-fold visuals across press + interviews.

issues.summary: Interviews section appears to be missing interview-specific asset mappings for the two Forbes records.
issues.details: The two newest interviews are present as rows, but image assignments are inherited from unrelated press features. Add dedicated interview assets/mappings to preserve section identity.

issues.summary: Three URLs contain percent-encoded U+FFFC artifact (%EF%BF%BC), likely introduced during scraping and prone to 404/canonical mismatch.
issues.details: Observed in podcasts (2) and press (1) links.

issues.summary: Near-duplicate press title pair differs only by hidden Unicode artifact.
issues.details: 'Macron Isn’t So Post-Colonial After All' is duplicated, with one variant containing hidden object replacement character and legacy URL artifact.

issues.summary: Cross-section duplication: 'A Human Rights Activist Explains Bitcoin’s Importance' appears as podcast + essay, which can blur taxonomy.
issues.details: Same title appears in podcasts and essays with Bloomberg context; decide canonical section and cross-link the other.

issues.summary: Books store product URL currently returns 404 (may be transient or moved).
issues.details: Both featured and item reference same store URL; verify current product permalink or replace with stable book landing page.
